title: JOB - Popular News
content:
Playbook can be run ad-hoc or as a Job to fetch results from Popular News sites

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Vibhu Bharadwaj pack (PopularCybersecurityNews, community-supported).

Inputs — KrebsOnSecurity: Set to false or leave empty to ignore fetching news from site; ThreatPost: Set to false or leave empty to ignore fetching news from site; TheHackerNews: Set to false or leave empty to ignore fetching news from site.

Integrations/scripts used: Popular News, SetGridField.
